notes: v1.0.6 — Poppins typography across the kiosk UI. Cancellable OTA: a Cancel button on the update overlay lets you abort a stuck or slow download (so a flaky network can no longer trap the kiosk mid-update). HugeIcons replace generic Material icons in the admin panel and overlay. Carries forward v1.0.5: persistent HOME launcher pin (survives OTA installs), three admin exit actions (Restart Kiosk / Quit to Android / Open Settings), reliable post-install relaunch.
